title: Bee Removal in Park Slope, Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Park Slope, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bee hive removal from brownstones and homes. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Park Slope's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic brownstones provide an ideal environment for bees to establish hives in walls, eaves, and chimneys. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional bee removal services throughout Park Slope, ensuring the safe and humane relocation of bee colonies from your property. Our experienced technicians understand the unique architecture of Park Slope homes and provide effective solutions for $350-$550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Park Slope's distinctive brownstone and Victorian-era architecture, with over 15 years of experience safely removing bee colonies without damaging historic structures. Our licensed technicians arrive quickly, use humane removal methods, and provide guaranteed results with same-day service available throughout the neighborhood.
localContext: Park Slope's mature trees along Prospect Park West and the neighborhood's abundant gardens attract honeybees and bumblebees, especially during spring and summer months. The area's historic brownstones, with their decorative cornices and older construction, often develop gaps where bees can enter and build hives in wall cavities or under roof eaves.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Park Slope?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Park Slope typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive's location, size, and accessibility. Hives in hard-to-reach areas like chimneys or between walls in brownstones may be at the higher end. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you relocate the bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate bee colonies rather than exterminating them, as bees are essential pollinators. Our technicians carefully remove the hive and relocate it to a safe area away from residential properties. We only recommend extermination in cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive from my Park Slope brownstone?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Park Slope for urgent bee removal situations. Most bee removals are completed within 2-4 hours, depending on the hive's size and location. We understand that active bee hives near entryways or in living spaces require immediate attention, especially for families with children or allergies.

faqs.question: Will the bees come back after removal?
faqs.answer: After removing the hive, we thoroughly clean the area to eliminate pheromones and seal all entry points to prevent bees from returning. We also provide recommendations for ongoing prevention. Our service includes a 30-day guarantee—if bees return to the same location within 30 days, we'll re-treat at no additional charge.
